content: I will write a script to automatically process the extracted view files, strip the line numbers (which are in the format `1234: `), and reconstruct the original TypeScript React code blocks for the custom document previews (`renderGdnDocument`, `renderHDNTDocument`, `renderHDTCDocument`, `renderHDCMDocument`, `InlineField`, and `GDNTableInputWordLike`).

args.Description: "Creates a script to strip line numbers from view log text and outputs clean TypeScript files."
